method: Unit tests drive every testable behavior. Browser-only assertions (sidebar active highlighting, mobile viewport collapse, modal + toast visuals, ToS checkbox UX, new-tab click) batch with the end-of-mission Playwright pass.

VAL-SET-002.evidence: SETTINGS_NAV_ITEMS order unit-tested; 5 items in fixed order.

VAL-SET-003.evidence: Active-state logic unit-tested (isActiveSubRoute + longest-prefix resolver); browser screenshot per sub-route pending Playwright.

VAL-SET-004.evidence: SiteClient preserves all existing fields; save/rotate paths covered.

VAL-SET-005.evidence: Modal + API + toast + router.refresh() wired; rate-limit tests from M1 cover the server endpoint. Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-SET-006.evidence: toast.success('Saved') wired in settings save. Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-SET-007.evidence: Parent /dashboard layout redirects guests; transitive to all /dashboard/settings/* sub-routes.

VAL-SET-008.evidence: Mobile horizontal tab strip implemented via Tailwind sm:hidden / hidden sm:block pair. Playwright mobile-viewport screenshot pending.

VAL-TOS-001.evidence: Submit disabled via disabled + aria-disabled until checkbox ticked; handleSubmit hard-guard returns early if state bypassed. Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-TOS-002.evidence: <Link target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' href='/terms'>. /terms placeholder page returns 200. Playwright click-to-new-tab pending.

VAL-TOS-003.evidence: Migration extends handle_new_user to read raw_user_meta_data.tos_accepted_at; signup path passes the timestamp via signInWithOtp options.data.

VAL-TOS-004.evidence: Banner mounted in dashboard layout when tos_accepted_at null; POST /api/account/accept-tos idempotent; /api/stripe/checkout and /api/stripe/change-plan return 403 tos_required. 6 unit tests.

discoveredFollowUps: Playwright pass now covers 12 browser-only assertions across foundation (3), billing-stripe (4), quota-meter (3), and settings-sidebar (5). Batch run at end-of-mission.
M8 replaces /terms placeholder with real legal copy (VAL-HARD-004).
Live cross-tab refresh of embed snippet on rotate-key would need Realtime subscription on sites — deferred to M8 hardening.
result: PASS — milestone sealed. 7/12 passed via unit + integration tests; 5 browser-only assertions deferred with documented follow-up paths.
